reviews.comment:
La atención es buena pero siempre hay cola. El precio del combustible es acorde a los precios de CABA, más baratas que en provincia.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but there's always a line. Fuel prices are in line with those in the City of Buenos Aires, cheaper than in the province.
